rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: source domain (Bali subak irrigation) - not an LLM-side prior
MOONCAKE Conductor IS a central global scheduler coordinating disaggregated prefill+decode KV cache pipeline - direct functional twin of SUBAK-COORD central scheduler
LMCache enterprise KV layer shared across engines with prefix reuse - centralized KV coordination primitive (already cited in candidate's own novelty_claim as prior art)
CacheTTL TTL-based KV scheduling for multi-turn agents - synchronized eviction window primitive overlaps SUBAK 'fallow windows'
EvicPress joint KV compression+eviction - synchronized cross-layer eviction policy overlaps synchronized fallow concept
KVFlow workflow-aware KV eviction based on agent execution order - directly implements ordered-stage coordinated eviction, twin of SUBAK 3-tier ordered cycle
llm-d global near-real-time KV cache locality view + routing to pods - central-coordinator primitive over KV cache state
C2C KV-cache communication ICLR 2026 - projects KV between pipeline stages, inter-stage cache coordination primitive (also explicitly cited by candidate as prior art)

fail_reason: 7 of 8 results are independent hits. MOONCAKE Conductor (FAST 2025) is a near-exact functional twin: a central global scheduler coordinating prefill/decode KV-cache pipeline stages. KVFlow already implements workflow/execution-order-aware KV eviction, mapping directly onto the subak 'ordered tier cycle'. LMCache provides a centralized enterprise KV layer shared across engines. The candidate's own novelty_claim explicitly enumerates LMCache, C2C and several KV-cache scheduling priors, then leans on '3-tier partition + central scheduler + synchronized fallow window' as the differentiator - but MOONCAKE Conductor + KVFlow + llm-d global routing collectively cover central scheduling, ordered-stage coordination, and synchronized eviction. The subak source mapping is decorative; the underlying LLM mechanism (pipelined KV cache + central scheduler + coordinated eviction) is saturated prior art. Cross-agent verification confirms the original 07_hit_miss.json scoring.
agreement_notes: Independent re-scoring matches original judgments at all 8 ranks within +/-0.02 on sem and func axes. Verdict FAIL confirmed.
